name: Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: (optional: 1 teaspoon cinnamon, 1/4 teaspoon cloves, 1 cup chopped nuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the cake flour through a fine mesh sieve and then sift it again with the dry ingredients except for sugar.
2. In a separate bowl, melt the chocolate and add boiling water. Stir until smooth.
3. In another bowl, cream the butter and add sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the egg yolks one at a time, then add to the chocolate mixture.
5. Gradually mix in the flour mixture with milk alternately, adding vanilla extract.
6. Whip the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
7. Gently fold the whipped whites into the batter.
8. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about half an hour.
